rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND C. LOW AND IRENE C. LOW REVOCABLE TRUST DATED JULY 6, 2001
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Renewed Motion And Motion For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Stephen M. Murphy. Before the court is Respondent Lydia Lee's Renewed Motion for Protective Order. The Motion for Protective Order is GRANTED in part. The court will adopt Respondent's version of the proposed protective order, minus the disputed final sentence in Paragraph 7 ("The Parties and Court acknowledge that bank and credit card records that are produced by the particular bank or credit card company or from the account holder do not fall within the scope of this provision"). Respondent is ORDERED to provide a revised proposed protective order to the court, removing reference to the protective order being "stipulated," as the protective order will issue as an order of the court. Respondent is FURTHER ORDERED to produce all withheld documents subject to the protective order within fifteen days of entry of the order. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
